items.summary:
There have been some notable releases for Switch 2 thus far, but nothing overly remarkable at this point. We have had some notable first-party releases with the new Mario Tennis game and the Super Mario Bros. Wonder expansion, not to mention the surprisingly well-received Pokémon Pokopia. But Nintendo is going to need some heavy hitters to keep the hype rolling this year – will we finally get a new 3D Mario experience? Doesn’t sound like it at this point, but rumor has it a massive Zelda remake is inbound alongside a new Star Fox game and much sooner than later at that.

items.title: Save $314 on Dyson’s highly advanced Gen5detect cordless vacuum that adapts to floor needs at $735
items.summary:
As part of the final day of Amazon’s Big Spring Sale, you can bring home Dyson’s highly-advanced Gen5detect Cordless Vacuum down at $734.99 shipped. This model would run you $1,049 were it at full price, but it’s dropping down to the second-best rate we have tracked in four months here while the savings last, beaten out by a short-term lightning sale that took things $35 lower last week. While we have seen the price go lower in 2025, those rates haven’t been seen since Black Friday, with the 30% markdown here still giving you a solid $314 cut from the tag. If you’re looking for a cheaper alternative, you can find a number of Dyson’s other vacuums, air purifiers, and fans getting up to 39% savings starting from $230 here.
